title: Deliciously Crunchy Croatian Pork Skillet
description: A hearty one-pot Croatian dish featuring pork, clear honey, and crunchy lardons, all cooked to perfection in a buttery skillet. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the lardons to the skillet and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lardons from the skillet and set aside.
Add the pork to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the paprika, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the clear honey to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the lardons to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the pork and lardons hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
